LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF FIA CARD SERVICES, N.A.'S MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF IS ENTITLED TO JUDGMENT IN ITS FAVOR AND AGAINST DEFENDANT SONIA MOTTA IN THE AMOUNT OF $6,737 PLUS COSTS AS DETERMINED BY THE COSTS MEMORANDUM PROCEDURE. NO OPPOSITION FILED. MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS
Off Calendar Mar-29-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF FIA CARD SERVICES, N.A.'s MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS is granted. Plaintiff is entitled to judgment in its favor and against defendant Sonia Motta in the amount of $6,737 plus costs as determined by the costs memorandum procedure. No opposition filed. Order and judgment signed. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Felicia Green; Court Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR No. 8189, email: ckaren@sftc.org; Dept. 302.
